module.name: native
module.purpose: Groups the concrete native tool programs by category. file/ owns filesystem tools (read, write, list, search); shell/ owns native shell command execution. mod.rs is re-export wiring only.

childModules.name: file
childModules.purpose: Filesystem native tool programs: ReadFile, WriteFile, ListDirectory, and SearchText.

childModules.name: shell
childModules.purpose: Native shell command execution tool program: ShellExecute.
